subdomain.description: The subdomain focus area being searched

candidates_markdown.description: Markdown table with ALL columns (ID + RESEARCH columns from column_definition). Use inline citations [n] after values. Empty string if no matches found.

citations.description: Map of citation numbers to URLs, e.g., {"1": "https://example.com", "2": "https://other.com"}

scoring.description: Scoring breakdown per row (separate from main table)

row_id.description: Row identifier matching first ID column value

no_matches_reason.description: If candidates_markdown is empty, explain why no matches were found

search_improvements.description: Suggestions for improving search results in future subdomains

domain_filtering_recommendations.description: Recommendations for domain filtering based on search results

add_to_excluded.description: Domains that should be excluded to improve results

reasoning.description: Why these domain exclusions would help
